## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Kyle Gaudreau (fwd.digital) and Jakub Rudnik for a strategic SEO/content role.](https://fathom.video/share/XJ9qeyXG-QbKy9aAMr1edmvYWewMoZ_9?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital is experiencing rapid growth, closing Series A funding, and has a significant client pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/XJ9qeyXG-QbKy9aAMr1edmvYWewMoZ_9?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [The company is transitioning to a pod-based model with managing editors leading teams](https://fathom.video/share/XJ9qeyXG-QbKy9aAMr1edmvYWewMoZ_9?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [There's a need for strategic support and scalable leadership to manage growth](https://fathom.video/share/XJ9qeyXG-QbKy9aAMr1edmvYWewMoZ_9?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [Jakub has extensive experience in content and SEO, particularly in scaling operations for high-growth companies](https://fathom.video/share/XJ9qeyXG-QbKy9aAMr1edmvYWewMoZ_9?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)

## Topics

### fwd.digital's Growth and Structure

  - [Recently closing Series A funding](https://fathom.video/share/XJ9qeyXG-QbKy9aAMr1edmvYWewMoZ_9?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [Transitioned to a pod-based model with managing editors](https://fathom.video/share/XJ9qeyXG-QbKy9aAMr1edmvYWewMoZ_9?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Revenue growth from \~$1M to nearly $6M](https://fathom.video/share/XJ9qeyXG-QbKy9aAMr1edmvYWewMoZ_9?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)
  - [Client base and pipeline have more than doubled](https://fathom.video/share/XJ9qeyXG-QbKy9aAMr1edmvYWewMoZ_9?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)
  - [Contracts ranging from $9k to $40k+](https://fathom.video/share/XJ9qeyXG-QbKy9aAMr1edmvYWewMoZ_9?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)

### Kyle's Background and Company Journey

  - [10 years agency-side, 8-9 years in-house experience](https://fathom.video/share/XJ9qeyXG-QbKy9aAMr1edmvYWewMoZ_9?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
  - [Joined fwd.digital in October, now leading operations and strategy](https://fathom.video/share/XJ9qeyXG-QbKy9aAMr1edmvYWewMoZ_9?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
  - [Implemented pod-based model for scalability](https://fathom.video/share/XJ9qeyXG-QbKy9aAMr1edmvYWewMoZ_9?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Company uses AI and automation for content creation, reducing costs significantly](https://fathom.video/share/XJ9qeyXG-QbKy9aAMr1edmvYWewMoZ_9?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)

### Market Demand and Opportunity

  - [High demand for fwd.digital's services, driven largely by word-of-mouth](https://fathom.video/share/XJ9qeyXG-QbKy9aAMr1edmvYWewMoZ_9?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
  - [Minimal marketing efforts, relying on thought leadership and results](https://fathom.video/share/XJ9qeyXG-QbKy9aAMr1edmvYWewMoZ_9?tab=summary&timestamp=946.0)
  - [Unique position in the market, offering hope and solutions for content marketers](https://fathom.video/share/XJ9qeyXG-QbKy9aAMr1edmvYWewMoZ_9?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)

### Jakub's Background and Experience

  - [Journalist turned content marketer](https://fathom.video/share/XJ9qeyXG-QbKy9aAMr1edmvYWewMoZ_9?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
  - [Extensive experience at G2, scaling blog traffic from 50k to 1.5M in 15-18 months](https://fathom.video/share/XJ9qeyXG-QbKy9aAMr1edmvYWewMoZ_9?tab=summary&timestamp=1375.0)
  - [Led content teams at various SaaS companies, including Scribe and Active Campaign](https://fathom.video/share/XJ9qeyXG-QbKy9aAMr1edmvYWewMoZ_9?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [Strong background in programmatic content creation and SEO strategy](https://fathom.video/share/XJ9qeyXG-QbKy9aAMr1edmvYWewMoZ_9?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

### Future Vision and Opportunities

  - [Potential for product development alongside agency services](https://fathom.video/share/XJ9qeyXG-QbKy9aAMr1edmvYWewMoZ_9?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)
  - [Emphasis on experimentation and rapid learning in content strategies](https://fathom.video/share/XJ9qeyXG-QbKy9aAMr1edmvYWewMoZ_9?tab=summary&timestamp=1718.0)
  - [Opportunity to focus on strategic thinking and creative problem-solving](https://fathom.video/share/XJ9qeyXG-QbKy9aAMr1edmvYWewMoZ_9?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)

## Next Steps

  - Jakub to consider the opportunity and follow up with any questions
  - [Potential scheduling of a follow-up conversation to discuss further details](https://fathom.video/share/XJ9qeyXG-QbKy9aAMr1edmvYWewMoZ_9?tab=summary&timestamp=1861.0)
  - [Explore how Jakub's experience could fit into fwd.digital's growth plans](https://fathom.video/share/XJ9qeyXG-QbKy9aAMr1edmvYWewMoZ_9?tab=summary&timestamp=1833.0)
